notes: Default runner is the Claude Code CLI; per-variant `runner_type` selects between 'claude', 'codex', and 'ollama'.
For non-Anthropic Claude variants, use command_prefix: ['ollama','launch','claude'] with main_model as the Ollama tag.
For Codex-routed variants, set runner_type: 'codex' (plain codex CLI) or runner_type: 'ollama' (auto-injects `ollama launch codex`).
isolate_home defaults to false so Claude subscription auth (read from ~/.claude/) works.
Set to true only when auth is via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and you want strict user-level agent isolation.

variants.label: Claude Opus 4.7 auditor
variants.selection_reason: Highest reasoning quality for catching subtle LangChain/Channels hallucinations and cross-file consistency. Most expensive.

variants.label: Claude Sonnet 4.6 auditor
variants.selection_reason: Mid-tier auditor. Good code reading, faster turnaround. Will likely match Opus on obvious API calls but may miss edge cases.

variants.label: Claude Haiku 4.5 auditor
variants.selection_reason: Cheapest, fastest. Risk of shallow reads on multi-file audits — better suited to a single-file pass or a first-pass screen.

variants.label: Kimi K2.6 (Ollama Cloud) auditor
variants.selection_reason: Alternative auditor via Ollama Cloud. Tests whether the same model that built the project can audit it (or a different model under the same harness).

variants.label: DeepSeek V4 Pro (Ollama Cloud) auditor
variants.selection_reason: DeepSeek V4 Pro via Ollama Cloud + Claude Code harness. Cross-checks Anthropic auditors with a different model family while keeping the same runner.

variants.label: Kimi K2.6 (Ollama Cloud) auditor via Codex
variants.selection_reason: Kimi K2.6 audit via `ollama launch codex` — cross-checks the claude-harness Kimi auditor with the codex harness for runner-attributable bias.

variants.label: DeepSeek V4 Pro (Ollama Cloud) auditor via Codex
variants.selection_reason: DeepSeek V4 Pro audit via `ollama launch codex` — cross-checks the claude-harness DeepSeek auditor.
